svg.title: CVEdge design system overview
svg.desc: Color tokens, chip variants, type scale, spacing and border radius for CVEdge
svg.text: Color tokens · Chip variants · Type scale · Spacing · Border radius
SCORE COLOUR SYSTEM — ATS + JOB MATCH
Dark filled — selected state, active filters, plan badges
Green outline — available options, unselected rewrite modes
Light green — trust signals, found keywords, confirmations
Red outline — missing ATS keywords, JD red flags
Warm amber — caution states, urgency signals, mid-severity flags, coming soon
Led transformer-based ranking model improving CTR by 14% across 200M+ daily users.
